name: program-phases-overlap
description: A session id MUST NOT appear in more than one phase's `sessions` array — phases are disjoint (§5.2). This matters most in phases-only mode (no top-level `sessions`), where the effective session list is the concatenation of `phases[].sessions` in phase order; an overlapping id would otherwise be silently duplicated with no defined tie-break. `sess-w2d1` appears in both `Hypertrophy` and `Strength`.
